name: C.H. Robinson Freight and Logistics API
what_it_does: C.H. Robinson freight brokerage and logistics REST API for shippers, carriers, and supply chain platforms to manage freight booking, load tendering, shipment tracking, rate management, and supply chain analytics — enabling automated freight procurement, multimodal shipping, and carrier management through C.H. Robinson's Navisphere platform, the world's largest freight brokerage network with 200,000+ carriers and 70,000+ customers. Enables AI agents to manage freight quote for shipping rate and capacity automation, handle load tender for freight booking and carrier assignment automation, access shipment tracking for multimodal freight visibility automation, retrieve carrier management for approved carrier list and performance automation, manage document for shipping document generation automation, handle invoice for freight bill and payment automation, access analytics for freight spend and performance reporting automation, retrieve market data for freight rate benchmark automation, manage exception for shipment exception and alert management automation, and integrate C.H. Robinson with ERP, WMS, and TMS systems for supply chain freight automation.
use_cases: Booking multimodal freight through C.H. Robinson network for shipper procurement automation agents
Tracking shipments across carrier network for supply chain visibility and exception management automation agents
Accessing freight market rate benchmarks for shipping cost optimization automation agents
Managing carrier performance and compliance for 3PL operations automation agents
not_for: Small parcel shipping (C.H. Robinson focuses on LTL, TL, intermodal — not parcel)
Ocean or air freight booking direct with carriers (C.H. Robinson brokers freight, doesn't operate vessels or aircraft)
Real estate or non-freight logistics (C.H. Robinson is freight and supply chain, not other sectors)
best_when: A shipper, manufacturer, or logistics technology company wanting AI agents to book multimodal freight, track shipments, access capacity from 200,000+ carriers, and analyze freight spend through C.H. Robinson's Navisphere platform.
avoid_when: COMMERCIAL RELATIONSHIP REQUIRED: C.H. Robinson API requires active commercial relationship; automated open API assumption creates restricted access; automated must establish C.H. Robinson customer or carrier account. SPOT MARKET VS CONTRACT PRICING: C.H. Robinson manages both spot market and contract rates; automated uniform pricing assumption creates rate_type_mismatch; automated must specify whether to request spot or contract rates. CARRIER TENDER ACCEPTANCE IS NOT GUARANTEED: Freight tenders require carrier acceptance; automated instant carrier acceptance assumption creates tender_pending for carrier review period; automated must implement tender workflow with acceptance tracking. MULTIMODAL COMPLEXITY: C.H. Robinson coordinates TL, LTL, intermodal, ocean, and air; automated uniform shipping mode assumption creates mode_mismatch for cross-modal freight; automated must specify correct shipping mode for each load.

auth.notes: C.H. Robinson uses OAuth2 for Navisphere REST API. REST API with JSON. Eden Prairie, MN HQ. Founded 1905. NASDAQ:CHRW. Products: Navisphere (TMS), freight brokerage, managed services, supply chain analytics. SDKs: None public. 200,000+ carriers. 70,000+ customers. $28B+ annual freight. World's largest freight broker. Competes with Echo Global Logistics and Coyote Logistics for freight brokerage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Developer access for approved partners; production requires commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Embedded in freight services; API access included with commercial relationship; no separate API fees
pricing.notes: Eden Prairie MN. NASDAQ:CHRW. Included with freight services. 200,000+ carriers. World's largest freight broker.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; quote and tender APIs throttled per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: FREIGHT QUOTE EXPIRY: C.H. Robinson rate quotes expire within short windows (often 30-60 minutes for spot market); automated stale-quote assumption creates price_expired for quotes used after expiry; automated must check quote validity before booking

CARRIER SELECTION IS CHR-MANAGED: C.H. Robinson selects specific carriers from network; automated direct-carrier-assignment assumption misunderstands CHR brokerage model; automated must allow CHR to select carrier within agreed service requirements

ACCESSORIAL CHARGES ARE SEPARATE: Freight accessorials (liftgate, inside delivery, residential) are charged separately; automated base-rate-only assumption creates surprise accessorial charges; automated must specify all required accessorials at time of quoting

EDI STILL PREVALENT: Many C.H. Robinson carrier integrations use EDI (214 tracking, 210 invoice); automated REST-only assumption may miss EDI-based carrier events; automated must handle both REST and EDI-derived data in tracking and invoicing

CUSTOMS AND BORDER IS SEPARATE: International freight customs brokerage is a separate service from freight; automated combined customs assumption creates separate_customs_service for cross-border shipments; automated must engage CHR customs separately for international freight
agent_readiness.security_notes: Freight brokerage. FMCSA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Freight, carrier, and shipper data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Freight brokerage. FMCSA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Freight and carrier network data.
